description: Overview of tissue engineering, including discussion of cell sources, cell-material interactions, tailoring biomaterials, methods of culture and characterization of engineering tissues, ethical issues, concluding with case studies of specific types of tissue engineering. Optional laboratory exercises offered throughout semester.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: B M E/​PHM SCI  430, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
